final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) reimagined as a 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 1990s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact film stock and color grading are yours
Composition: must include foreground couple embrace, background figures positioned at distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝 (Zhi Zunbao) and 紫霞 (Zixia) embracing and kissing on the city wall, 牛魔王 (Bull Demon King) and 唐僧 (Tang Seng) standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include the city wall setting with distant background space for secondary figures
Lighting/mood: needs a romantic yet epic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 1990s Hong Kong cinema direction — exact saturation and grading are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
